project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Abdil is assigned to support this job. He will travel to Billund on the 6am flight 21st May and he has a check-in at 14:00 on 22nd. He will stay in the Cabinn Plus for 1 night.

project: PRJ03251 - Baker Hughes - Baker Hughes Qatar - NFR2-2_NFR2-5A - MFC
comment: Latest from Baker Hughes is that the job has slipped again. Earliest expected mobilisation is now the 25th with latest possibly the 31st May.

project: PRJ03307 - Well Sanam - Qatar Head Office - TBC - MFC
comment: Wellsanam have mobilised with Haliburton to start off the campaign, giving us a 7 day window to get ready for the start of our planned ops. However due to "issues" Wellsanam are currently in discussion with QE LNG for us to displace Halliburton. We are expecting an update later today and this could potentially be mobilising this week. Inspection of READ equipment has been arranged for tomorrow morning.
